name: chain_gov_contract_contact_center_tier_1_cc
method: [GOV CONTRACT] CONTACT CENTER TIER 1 (CCT1)- THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER IS TO PROVIDE TIER 0 AND TIER 1 LEVEL SUPPORT FOR THE USCIS CONTACT CENTER BY A (deadline: 2026-08-12)

stages.task: Query SAM.gov API for NAICS 561422/561320/541519 + keywords 'contact center tier 1 tier 0 help desk' + set-aside small business. Filter deadline >30d.

Score each opp: set-aside type (8a/WOSB/SDVOSB preferred), incumbent vulnerable?, recompete?, agency budget history, period of performance. Kill if: >$50M (too big solo), no set-aside (full/open = low win rate), <21d to deadline.

For each qualified opp: find prime contractors already holding agency vehicles (GSA MAS, BPA, GWAC). Email outreach: 'We provide vetted Tier 0/1 contact center staff, USCIS-cleared, looking to team on CCT1 recompete.' Use existing cold_outbound chain.
